prompt: An adolescent is a person between 9 and 19 years-old.
hint: Is the original term vague while the definition is precise, or vice versa?
explanation: Adolescence shades in and out gradually; nobody becomes an adolescent precisely on their 9th birthday and stops on their 20th. The exact 9-to-19 range is more precise than the vague term, so it fails to MATCH THE VAGUENESS.
